name: Brother HL-L2375DW Monochrome Laser Printer

name: Brother MFC-J3540DW
shortDescription: Automatic 2-sided (Duplex) Print up to A3/LGR, 2.7" TFT Color Touchscreen LCD, Up to 250 sheets of 80 gsm plain paper

Two paper trays with 500 sheets combined capacity, accepts up to A3 paper size.

name: Deli P1820W A4 Monochrome Laser Printer
shortDescription: Print Only, Print Speed: 20ppm, Toner Cartridge: 1600 Sheets, Smart Control: Deli Print APP, Print Resolution: 1200 x 600dpi, Connection: USB + WiFi + Bluetooth
description: The P1820W is a sleek A4 single-function (print-only) monochrome laser printer crafted for fast, reliable printing in home offices or small businesses. Delivers up to 20 ppm for A4 and 32 ppm on A5. Sharp print quality at 600x600 dpi with enhanced mode reaching 1200x600 dpi. Seamless wireless printing via Wi-Fi (802.11 b/g/n), Bluetooth 4.2, and USB 2.0. T108 toner cartridge yielding up to 1600 pages. Monthly duty cycle of up to 10,000 pages.

name: Deli M1820W Monochrome Laser MFP Printer
shortDescription: Print, Copy, Scan, Monochrome Laser Printer, Print Speed: 20ppm, Toner Cartridge: 1600 Sheets, Connection: USB + WiFi + Bluetooth
description: The Deli M1820W is a compact and versatile A4 monochrome laser printer that delivers fast, efficient printing, copying, and scanning — ideal for home offices and small businesses. All-in-one functionality with print, copy, and scan. Achieves up to 20 ppm for A4 and up to 32 ppm for A5. Supports USB 2.0, Wi-Fi (802.11 b/g/n) and Bluetooth 4.2. T108 toner cartridge capable of printing up to 1,600 pages. Monthly duty cycle of up to 10,000 pages.

name: Deli M3100ADNW Monochrome Laser A4 Printer
shortDescription: Print, Copy, Scan, Print Speed: 31ppm, Toner Cartridge: 3500 Sheets, Connection: USB + WiFi + LAN, Print Resolution: 1200 x 1200dpi, Duplex Print, Document Feeder
description: The Deli M3100ADNW is a robust A4 monochrome laser all-in-one printer designed for efficient, high-volume printing, copying, and scanning in busy offices. Prints up to 31 pages per minute with auto duplex printing at up to 16 faces per minute. Maximum print resolution of 1,200 x 1,200 dpi. Equipped with USB 2.0, Ethernet and Wi-Fi. 250-sheet main paper tray and 35-page RADF. T31 toner cartridge yielding approximately 3,500 pages. Monthly duty cycle of up to 30,000 pages.
